---
title: "Abbreviations"
---

| Term | Meaning |
|---|---|
| ETR | Effective Tax Rate |
| ETR_K | Effective Tax Rate on Capital |
| ETR_L | Effective Tax Rate on Labour |
| ETR_cit | Effective Tax Rate on Corporations (CIT) |
| NNI | Net National Income |
| NDP | Net Domestic Product |
| NIT | Net Indirect Taxes (taxes on production minus subsidies) |
| CFC | Consumption of Fixed Capital (depreciation) |
| CE | Compensation of Employees |
| OS | Operating Surplus |
| MI | Mixed Income |
| MIOS | Mixed Income and Operating Surplus combined |
| NFI | Net Factor Income from abroad |
| WID | World Inequality Database |
| SNA | System of National Accounts |
| HA | Historical Archives (long historical revenue source) |
| NS | National Statistics (country-level revenue source) |
| ICTD | International Centre for Tax and Development |
| GFS | Government Finance Statistics (IMF) |
| OECD GRS | OECD Global Revenue Statistics |
| PYZ | Piketty-Yang-Zucman (2019) methodology for China |
| RPC | Revenue and Primary Commodities (supplementary social contributions source) |
| PIT | Personal Income Tax |
| CIT | Corporate Income Tax |
